name: Salted Peanut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the order listed into the bread machine pan.
2. Select white bread setting and press "start".
3. If using a manual mixer, mix until smooth.
4. After second kneading, remove dough from the machine.
5. Divide dough into two equal portions.
6. Place each portion in small loaf pans.
7. Cover and let rise for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes.
